sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Walmart는 2026 회계연도 1분기 매출 1,777억 5,100만 달러를 기록하며 거시경제 불확실성 속에서도 안정적인 운영을 지속하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출 1,777억 5,100만 달러를 달성하며 견고한 외형 성장을 유지하고 있습니다.
영업이익 74억 9,300만 달러와 순이익 53억 3,000만 달러를 기록하며 수익성을 확보했습니다.
자본 효율성 평가를 위해 ROA와 ROI 지표를 활용하여 전략적 자산 배분을 관리하고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 관세 및 무역 제한, 인플레이션, 연료 가격 변동 등 거시경제적 불확실성이 지속되고 있습니다.
중국, 베트남, 멕시코 등 주요 수입국으로부터의 공급망 압박과 환율 변동이 운영 결과에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 소싱, 가격 책정, 재고 관리 등 운영 효율화를 통해 '매일 낮은 가격(EDLP)' 전략을 유지하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 총자산 2,896억 700만 달러 규모의 재무 구조를 보유하고 있습니다.
현금및현금성자산 107억 2,900만 달러를 확보하여 유동성을 유지하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 글로벌 공급망 리스크와 관세 환경 변화가 향후 영업이익률에 미칠 영향과 잉여현금흐름 창출 능력을 지속적으로 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-04-30 revenue = 1,777억 5,100만 달러 (USD 177.751B; 177,751 million), XBRL range 2026-02-01..2026-04-30.
Quarter ended 2026-04-30 operating income = 74억 9,300만 달러 (USD 7.493B; 7,493 million), XBRL range 2026-02-01..2026-04-30.
Quarter ended 2026-04-30 net income = 53억 3,000만 달러 (USD 5.33B; 5,330 million), XBRL range 2026-02-01..2026-04-30.
Quarter ended 2026-04-30 total assets = 2,896억 700만 달러 (USD 289.607B; 289,607 million), XBRL range instant..2026-04-30.
Quarter ended 2026-04-30 cash and cash equivalents = 107억 2,900만 달러 (USD 10.729B; 10,729 million), XBRL range instant..2026-04-30.

Macroeconomic Conditions and Potential Impacts We expect continued uncertainty in our business and the global economy due to the following factors: tariffs and trade restrictions, including potential refunds; inflationary trends; fluctuations in global currencies; swings in macroeconomic conditions and their effect on consumer confidence; changes in employment trends; volatility in fuel prices; and supply chain pressures, any of which may impact our results. While we operate in a highly dynamic tariff environment, less than one third of what we sell in the U.S. is imported, with most of our imports coming from China,Vietnam, Mexico, India and Canada. We are committed to helping customers save money and live better through everyday low prices, supported by everyday low costs. Our operating results are influenced in part by our sourcing, pricing, merchandising, inventory management and oth

Liquidity and Capital Resources section. 18 Table of Contents Return on Assets and Return on Investment We include Return on Assets ("ROA") and Return on Investment ("ROI") as metrics to assess our return on capital. ROA is the most directly comparable measure based on our financial statements presented in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles in the U.S. ("GAAP") while ROI is considered a non-GAAP financial measure. Management believes ROI is a meaningful metric to share with investors because it helps investors assess how effectively Walmart is deploying its assets. Trends in ROI can fluctuate over time as management balances long-term strategic initiatives with possible short-term impacts. Our calculation of ROI is considered a non-GAAP financial measure because it uses financial measures that differ from those used in ROA, the most directly comparable GAAP financia

Cash Flow Free cash flow is considered a non-GAAP financial measure. Management believes, however, that free cash flow, which measures our ability to generate additional cash from our business operations, is an important financial measure for use in evaluating the Company's financial performance. Free cash flow should be considered in addition to, rather than as a substitute for, consolidated net income as a measure of our performance and net cash provided by operating activities as a measure of our liquidity.
